# terrible_community_general_pkg5 (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) An FRMI of the package(s) to be installed/removed/updated. Multiple packages may be specified, separated by `,`.

### Optional

- `accept_licenses` (Boolean) Accept any licences.
- `be_name` (String) Creates a new boot environment with the given name.
- `refresh` (Boolean) Refresh publishers before execution.
- `state` (String) Whether to install (`present`, `latest`), or remove (`absent`) a package.
- `verbose` (Boolean) Set to `true` to disable quiet execution.
